/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,librmd.so.1 -o librmd.so.1.0.0 CMakeFiles/rmd.dir/src/SerialPort.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rmd.dir/src/SerialComm.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rmd.dir/src/x10_api_base.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rmd.dir/src/x10_api.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rmd.dir/src/config.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rmd.dir/src/MyActuator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rmd.dir/src/Motor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rmd.dir/src/CommandScheduler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rmd.dir/src/MotorManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rmd.dir/src/CommandExecuter.cpp.o
